title: Smooth Survival: Early Game Overhaul
description: Enhanced Recipes, A better way to fly and so much more
body:
### Enhanced Recipes
This datapack expands your crafting options with highly requested recipes, including the Enchanted Golden Apple (Notch Apple) and Horse Armor. It also adds quality-of-life features like compacting 9 cobblestone into a single stone block—perfect for inventory management during long mining sessions.
Bulk Torches: Need to light up a cave? Combine 1 Coal Block and 1 Plank to get 36 Torches instantly.
### New Foods
No Need to carry a crafing table thanks to the new croissants that can be crafted in the 2x2 crafting grid. Another fan favourite is the meat pie which is crafted using 6 wheat and 3 of any meats like pork, chicken, steak and mutton.

Note: All recipes are automatically unlocked upon world load, so you can start crafting immediately without the guesswork.
All Versions 1.2.2 and Above Require a Resource Pack for new models Download it here
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smooth-survival-resource-pack
